top_signals.title: Today’s windfall is a warning for state oil companies
top_signals.summary: Continuing to invest as if yesterday’s assumptions will govern tomorrow’s world means they won’t be around in 40 years
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Paxton bests Cornyn in Texas Republican Senate primary after Trump endorsement
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump last week endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton over incumbent Sen. John Cornyn.
